name: che-transport-mcp
description: Taiwan TDX transport MCP — 26 tools across Rail / Bus / Bike / Air / Traffic / Parking (multi-modal TRA↔Taipei-Metro via transit_route + direct-route bus via bus_route, rail→bus via rail_bus_route). Self-contained marketplace: this repo holds the binary source, the plugin shell, and the marketplace catalog.

plugins.name: che-transport-mcp
plugins.description: Wraps the PsychQuant/che-transport-mcp binary (binaryVersion-pinned auto-download). 26 tools: rail (rail_route time-dependent + metro_find_route), transit_route (TRA↔Taipei-Metro multi-modal), rail_bus_route (rail→bus, explicit name-matched transfer), bus_route (direct-route bus, A2 live board + honest timetable arrival), bus/bike/air/traffic/parking. 3-tier cache TTL, NSQL confirmation discipline.
